prompt:
Portrait shot on 85mm f/1.4, medium close-up of a Japanese woman in her late 20s, dark messy updo, confident sharp-boned face, strong jaw, pale skin against black, direct sidelong gaze away from camera, holding a cigarette in raised hand, lips closed. She wears an oversized off-shoulder black long-sleeve ribbed top.

Upper body portrait, editorial framing, seated reclined on grey sofa, black and white photographic rendering, strong compositional awareness, model occupies left two-thirds of frame.

Black and white, diffused soft window light from upper left, gentle gradient on face, textured shadow on right side, cinematic editorial quality.

Photographic texture and quality: high-contrast black and white film stock grain, ISO 800 structure, skin with visible texture and natural imperfection, stray hairs from updo not perfectly contained, photographic texture not CG render smoothness.

Avoid: color, flat even lighting, AI-polished skin.

--ar 3:4
